query_title: The Legend of the Black Charro

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Chupacabras
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan and his team of "ghostbusters" continue with their adventures, this time fighting against the mexican monster himself: "El Chupacabras".

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Guanajuato Mummies
recommendations.overview: Three friends confront a horde of mummies, who have inexplicably awakened, and try to rescue their pal, not realizing they have fallen into a trap.

recommendations.title: La Leyenda de los Chaneques
recommendations.overview: Five years after giving up his powers and separating from his friends, Leo San Juan has started a new life trying to focus on his family and their bakery, staying away from danger and adventures. However, Leo knows that his plans are rarely fulfilled

recommendations.title: The Legend of La Llorona
recommendations.overview: Based on a famous Mexican legend, a group of kids must stop the ghost of a woman whose guilt over the drowning of her own children leads her to abduct youngsters who wander the woods at night.

recommendations.title: Prison 77
recommendations.overview: Modelo Prison. Barcelona, 1977. A young accountant, awaiting trial for embezzlement with a possible 20 years sentence, joins a group of prisoners demanding amnesty.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan, an insecure child of nine years old, lives eternally frightened by horror stories that Nando tells his older brother. Within these stories it is 'The Legend of Nahuala', according to which, an old abandoned Casona is possessed by the sp

recommendations.title: Smoke & Mirrors
recommendations.overview: A tale of cheats and impostors, taking its inspiration from true facts and from one of the most intriguing characters of recent decades: the spy Francisco Paesa.

recommendations.title: Marshland
recommendations.overview: The Spanish Deep South, 1980. A series of brutal murders of adolescent girls in a remote and forgotten town bring together two disparate characters – both detectives in the homicide division – to investigate the cases.

recommendations.title: The Vow

recommendations.title: Ozzy
